penalties.description: Task was not completed within the observable frames. All six objects were successfully transferred to the opposite side but the return transfers back to the original side were not completed.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: Major disagreement between models on task completion. Claude observed only outbound transfers without return phase completion, while GPT reported full completion with lost objects. Given the fundamental disagreement on whether the task was completed, and that incomplete_task is an automatic zero condition in the rubric, the more conservative incomplete assessment is adopted.
